title: Entity (Person)
description: A person involved in incidents: offender, victim, associate, or witness. PII-bearing (pii_level=high) — populated only from synthetic or MOU pilot data, never open NCRB. Analyst-facing views mask/minimize per roadmap §9.

entity_id.description: Stable surrogate id after entity resolution (dedupes aliases)

aliases.description: Known alternate names; drives entity resolution

age_band.description: Banded, not exact DOB, to minimize PII

incident_count.description: Number of linked incidents; >=2 with role=offender => repeat offender

resolution_confidence.description: Entity-resolution confidence; low values flagged for manual merge review

source_id.description: data_sources.json id (lineage); expect synthetic_fir or pilot_fir_mou
